set_value.name: $token
set_value.exact: if event.param3? and event.param3.$token? then event.param3.$token else ''

set_value.name: $json
set_value.exact: if md.ai_influence_chat.Cards.$store? and md.ai_influence_chat.Cards.$store.{$key}? then md.ai_influence_chat.Cards.$store.{$key} else ''

set_value.name: $psector
set_value.exact: if player.sector.exists and player.sector.knownname? then player.sector.knownname else 'unknown space'

debug_text.text: 'AIC grounding traffic=' + $traffic + ' sector=' + $psector + ' owned=' + $owned + ' pmoney=' + $pmoney + ' pfleet=' + $pfleet

raise_lua_event.name: 'AIChat.open'
raise_lua_event.param: 'faction_id=' + $faction + '|target_name=' + $target + '|save_id=' + $sid + '|npc_role=' + $nrole + '|npc_skill=' + $nskill + '|npc_ship=' + (if md.ai_influence_conversation.State.$current_npc? and md.ai_influence_conversation.State.$current_npc.ship? and md.ai_influence_conversation.State.$current_npc.ship.knownname? then md.ai_influence_conversation.State.$current_npc.ship.knownname else '') + '|npc_fleet=' + (if md.ai_influence_conversation.State.$current_npc? and md.ai_influence_conversation.State.$current_npc.ship? and md.ai_influence_conversation.State.$current_npc.ship.commander? and md.ai_influence_conversation.State.$current_npc.ship.commander.knownname? then md.ai_influence_conversation.State.$current_npc.ship.commander.knownname else '') + '|initial=' + $initial + '|standing=' + $standing + '|psector=' + $psector + '|nearby=' + $nearby + '|traffic=' + $traffic + '|npc_owned=' + $owned + '|pmoney=' + $pmoney + '|pfleet=' + $pfleet + '|real_facid=' + (if md.ai_influence_conversation.State.$facid? then md.ai_influence_conversation.State.$facid else '') + '|fleetcmd=' + (if md.ai_influence_conversation.State.$current_npc? and md.ai_influence_conversation.State.$current_npc.ship? and md.ai_influence_conversation.State.$current_npc.ship.allsubordinates? then md.ai_influence_conversation.State.$current_npc.ship.allsubordinates.count else 0) + '|issub=' + (if md.ai_influence_conversation.State.$current_npc? and md.ai_influence_conversation.State.$current_npc.ship? and md.ai_influence_conversation.State.$current_npc.ship.commander? then 1 else 0)

write_to_logbook.title: 'Conversation payment: ' + $amt + ' Cr'
write_to_logbook.text: 'Paid in person - ' + (if event.param3.$why? then event.param3.$why else 'an agreed exchange')

do_if.value: event.param3.$deliverable? and event.param3.$deliverable == 'vassalage' and $paid and $amt ge $askedv and event.param3.$vfaction?

write_to_logbook.title: 'A Tributary Bought'
write_to_logbook.text: faction.{$vf}.knownname + ' has accepted vassalage under your banner in exchange for tribute and protection.'

do_if.value: event.param3.$deliverable? and event.param3.$deliverable == 'production_priority' and (($paid and $amt ge $askedv) or $amt == 0)

write_to_logbook.title: 'Production Favor'
write_to_logbook.text: 'The manager at ' + @$st2.knownname + ' prioritized production - ' + (if $added2? then $added2 else 0) + ' units of ' + @$w2.name + ' added to station stock.'

debug_text.text: 'AIC FAVOR add_cargo ' + (if $added2? then $added2 else 0) + ' of ' + @$w2 + ' at ' + @$st2.knownname

do_if.value: event.param3.$deliverable? and event.param3.$deliverable == 'blind_eye' and (($paid and $amt ge $askedv) or $amt == 0)

write_to_logbook.title: 'An Understanding'
write_to_logbook.text: 'An officer of ' + $bf + ' has agreed to keep your name out of security reports for a while.'

debug_text.text: 'AIC BLIND EYE armed for ' + $bf + ' until beat ' + Guard.$BlindEye.{'$' + $bf}

do_if.value: event.param3.$deliverable? and event.param3.$deliverable == 'trade_summary' and (($paid and $amt ge $askedv) or $amt == 0)

write_to_logbook.title: 'Trade Ledger Summary - ' + @$sta.knownname
write_to_logbook.text: 'Compiled in confidence at ' + @$sta.knownname + (if @$sta.sector != null then ' (' + $sta.sector.knownname + ')' else '') + '. Live stock vs demand: ' + $lines

debug_text.text: 'AIC INTEL no station/cargo resolvable for deliverable'

write_to_logbook.title: 'Security Incident'
write_to_logbook.text: if $sd.$desc? then $sd.$desc else 'A security incident aboard a station.'

do_if.value: $sf != '' and Guard.$BlindEye? and Guard.$BlindEye.{'$' + $sf}? and Guard.$BlindEye.{'$' + $sf} gt (player.age / 1h)

debug_text.text: 'AIC SECURITY blind-eye active for ' + $sf + ' - record scrubbed'
'AIC SECURITY relation hit ' + $sf + ' vs player -' + $hit + ' (identified, repeat=' + $rep + ')'

show_notification.text: faction.{$sf}.knownname + ' security services are now watching you'

write_to_logbook.title: 'Security Attention'
write_to_logbook.text: 'Repeated incidents have drawn formal attention from ' + faction.{$sf}.knownname + ' security services. Expect closer scrutiny at their stations.'

debug_text.text: 'AIC SECURITY incident recorded (player NOT identified - no standing hit)'

do_if.value: event.param3 != killmethod.collected and event.param3 != killmethod.removed and event.param2?

raise_lua_event.name: 'AIChat.world_event'
raise_lua_event.param: 'kind=combat|a=' + (if $vic.owner? then $vic.owner else '') + '|to=' + 'The player destroyed the ' + $vkind + ' ' + @$vic.knownname + ' (' + $vown + ') in ' + $vsec

write_to_logbook.title: 'Received: ' + $title
write_to_logbook.text: if $body != '' then $body else ('A ' + $kind + ' received in person.')

debug_text.text: 'AIC ITEM given kind=' + $kind + ' title=' + $title + ' count=' + player.entity.inventory.{$w}.count
'AIC ITEM rejected kind=' + $kind + ' (unknown kind or wares not booted yet - restart required after install)'

write_to_logbook.title: 'Received: Probe Letter'
write_to_logbook.text: 'A self-test letter from the AI Influence item system. If you can read this in your logbook and find a Sealed Letter in your inventory, #280 works.'

raise_lua_event.name: 'AIChat.world_event'
raise_lua_event.param: 'kind=pact|a=' + $tp.$a + '|b=' + $tp.$b + '|vis=secret-terms|ap=economic|to=|tt=' + faction.{$tp.$b}.knownname + ' completed its ' + @$tp.$w.name + ' supply pact with ' + faction.{$tp.$a}.knownname

do_if.value: $tgt3 != null and $cnt3 != null and $tgt3 gt 200 and $cnt3 lt ($tgt3 / 2)
$scnt != null and $scnt gt 800 and ($stgt == null or $scnt gt $stgt)

debug_text.text: 'AIC TRADE council convened: ' + $buyer + ' needs ' + @$needW.name + ' (sev ' + $worstSev + '), ally ' + $supF + ' has surplus'

set_value.name: $truth
set_value.exact: faction.{$pd.$b}.knownname + ' signs a supply pact: ' + $qty + ' ' + @$pd.$w.name + ' for ' + faction.{$pd.$a}.knownname

debug_text.text: 'AIC TRADE pact signed with DECEPTIVE announcement (' + $pd.$a + '/' + $pd.$b + ')'
